summary: Iteration 141: Tested 3 new changes - (1) Backend address loading fix in store.py for country-based product visibility, (2) Preview card button/modal in ProductEditor, (3) Visibility tab country dropdown. All backend API tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests passed with clear visual confirmation.

verified_features.fix_1_address_loading_backend: PASS - store.py get_products (lines 160-168) now queries db.addresses by customer_id and attaches addr to customer doc as 'address' key. get_product (lines 210-215) has same fix. _eval_single_vis_cond already handles nested address.country correctly.
verified_features.fix_2_preview_card_button: PASS - data-testid='product-editor-preview' button visible in header with Eye icon and 'Preview card' text. Confirmed in screenshot iter141_editor_header.jpeg
verified_features.fix_3_preview_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking 'Preview card' opens modal with data-testid='store-card-preview-modal'. Modal shows 'Store card preview' header + 'LIVE PREVIEW' badge + OfferingCard component + chips for Product name/Card tag/Card description/Bullets/Price CTA
verified_features.fix_4_live_name_update: PASS - When 'Test Service' typed in Product Name field, reopening modal shows 'Test Service' in the OfferingCard in real time. 'Product name' chip turns green (✓). Confirmed in screenshot iter141_live_preview_name.jpeg
verified_features.fix_6_modal_close_backdrop: PASS - Clicking outside the card panel (backdrop) closes modal
verified_features.fix_7_visibility_country_dropdown: PASS - Visibility tab → Conditional radio → condition builder shows: Customer field='Country', Operator='equals', Value='Select country...' (shadcn select dropdown, not text input). Also shows '+ Add condition' and '+ Add group' buttons. Confirmed in screenshot iter141_visibility_country.jpeg

critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix in store.py is correct: db.addresses queried by customer_id, addr attached as customer['address']. The _eval_single_vis_cond function correctly reads nested address.country. No issues found.

ProductEditor.tsx StoreCardPreview component correctly derives previewProduct from form state and renders OfferingCard. The Chip components correctly show green (active) vs gray (inactive) based on form field values.
Minor: StoreCardPreview uses form.currency || 'GBP' as default currency (hardcoded GBP), while EMPTY_FORM likely defaults to USD. Cosmetic only - preview card uses GBP fallback.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily created and deleted TEST_Preview_Card_Product via admin API to verify visibility condition persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 141 adds 3 features on top of 140's 22 fixes. All 3 verified: (1) db.addresses fix in store.py get_products/get_product, (2) Preview card button in ProductEditor header, (3) Country dropdown in visibility conditions builder. Admin platform at /admin/products/new. Partner code: automate-accounts. All features working without issues.
rca_of_issues: N/A - No bugs found. All 3 new changes working correctly.
